free_text: Excitation functions for productions of heavy
actinides from interactions of O-16 with Cf-249
The Bk fractions were assayed with a Ge(Li)
The Fm and Md fractions were measured with a
Si(Au) spectrometer system which recorded spontaneous
fission events and alpha spectra simultaneously.
A 0.334 mg/cm**2 target of Cf-249 as Cf(2)O(3)
electroplated with a diameter of 6.5 mm on
2.75 mg/cm**2 Be foil was prepared and used.
